hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Ask for help at work politely: Can you help me? Can you repeat? Can you speak slowly? -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Asking for Help at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 8 -- Asking for Help

listenings.text: Hello Graziele. Please remember: it is okay to ask for help. If you have a question, you can ask me. If I speak fast, you can say: please speak slowly. If you do not understand, I can repeat. There is no problem. We are a team, and I am happy to help you.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana. A quick reminder before the meeting. Do not worry. If you need help, just ask. You can say: Can you repeat, please? or Can you speak slowly? Everyone asks questions. It is normal. You are doing great. Good luck!

extra_audio.text: Dr. Carter explains a new process. Graziele has a question. She asks him to speak slowly. He repeats the last part. Now she understands and says thank you.
